title: canthium cambodianum
intro: Canthium cambodianum, also known as the Cambodian canthium, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of the plant include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic. Canthium cambodianum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
